name: Memory of Encaustic Tile
overview: Amid Beijing’s hutongs, three childhood friends bound by love, loss, and legacy grow up to follow diverging paths - one chasing freedom, one preserving history, and one burying unspoken love.

trailers.title: MULTISUB【昔有琉璃瓦 Memory Of Encaustic Tile】预告：琉璃胡同五小只青春版预告~ | 陈钰琪/林一/晏紫东/马丽/唐旭/房子斌/苑冉 | 爱情剧 | 优酷 YOUKU
